title: ctenitis preslii
intro: Ctenitis preslii, also known as Presl's Ctenitis, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are derived from its high concentration of saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Ctenitis preslii include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Ctenitis preslii is often prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
